aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business as a top recommendation due to limited conversational content and authority signals.
quick_wins: Expand content with more detailed, conversational answers to common appliance repair queries.
Implement structured data for FAQPage and HowTo to enhance AI visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can benefit from more frequent posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Seek additional high-quality directory listings to reinforce NAP.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema enhancements for appliance repair services.
No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for repair processes.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed, conversational content tailored for AI query interpretation.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'same-day appliance repair in Arvada' and 'affordable appliance repair near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema and expanding content with targeted, conversational FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, technician expertise, and detailed repair processes to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top answer for appliance repair queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP is strong, but AI assistants overlook your business due to a lack of structured data and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates structured data, expands conversational content, and enhances GBP engagement to make your business the go-to choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.

email_subject_line: Boost AI Visibility: Your Appliance Repair Business Deserves Top Spot
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found significant opportunities to enhance your AI-driven visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top recommendation for AI search users.
